---
title: "Mirror Tags"
---

This page shows all available date-stamped tags for the SSC Archive mirror.
Each tag corresponds to a snapshot of the archive on that date.

The tags are grouped into contiguous date ranges. Within a contiguous range, every calendar date has a corresponding snapshot. Gaps indicate dates where no snapshot was taken (e.g. due to workflow failures or intentional gaps).

<!-- DataTables CSS -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">

<div id="tags-summary" class="callout callout-style-default callout-note"></div>

## Contiguous ranges

<table id="ranges-table" class="display" style="width:100%">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Range #</th>
      <th>Start date</th>
      <th>End date</th>
      <th>Days covered</th>
      <th>Expected snapshots</th>
      <th>Actual snapshots</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
</table>

## All tags

<table id="tags-table" class="display" style="width:100%">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>#</th>
      <th>Tag</th>
      <th>Date</th>
      <th>Range</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
</table>

<!-- jQuery -->
<script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
<!-- DataTables JS -->
<script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>

<script>
$(document).ready(function () {
  $.getJSON('data/tags.json', function (tagsData) {
    var tags = tagsData.tags;          // sorted array of tag name strings, oldest first
    var ranges = tagsData.ranges;      // array of {start, end, count, tags_list} objects
    var earliest = tags.length > 0 ? tags[0] : '';
    var latest   = tags.length > 0 ? tags[tags.length - 1] : '';

    // ---- summary callout ----
    if (tags.length > 0) {
      $('#tags-summary').html(
        '<div class="callout-header"><div class="callout-icon-container">' +
        '<i class="callout-icon"></i></div>' +
        '<div class="callout-title-container flex-fill">Summary</div></div>' +
        '<div class="callout-body-container callout-body">' +
        '<p><strong>Total snapshots:</strong> ' + tags.length + '</p>' +
        '<p><strong>Earliest tag:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/labordynamicsinstitute/ssc-mirror/releases/tag/' + earliest + '" target="_blank">' + earliest + '</a></p>' +
        '<p><strong>Latest tag:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/labordynamicsinstitute/ssc-mirror/releases/tag/' + latest + '" target="_blank">' + latest + '</a></p>' +
        '<p><strong>Contiguous ranges:</strong> ' + ranges.length + '</p>' +
        '</div>'
      );
    }

    // ---- ranges table ----
    var rangesRows = [];
    ranges.forEach(function (r, i) {
      var startDate = new Date(r.start);
      var endDate   = new Date(r.end);
      var daysCovered = Math.round((endDate - startDate) / 86400000) + 1;
      var isCurrent = (r.end === latest);
      var isEarliest = (r.start === earliest);
      var rowClass = '';
      if (isCurrent && isEarliest) rowClass = 'row-both';
      else if (isCurrent) rowClass = 'row-latest';
      else if (isEarliest) rowClass = 'row-earliest';

      rangesRows.push({
        range_num: i + 1,
        start: r.start,
        end: r.end,
        days: daysCovered,
        expected: daysCovered,
        actual: r.count,
        rowClass: rowClass
      });
    });

    var rangesTable = $('#ranges-table').DataTable({
      data: rangesRows,
      columns: [
        { data: 'range_num' },
        {
          data: 'start',
          render: function (data, type, row) {
            if (type === 'display') {
              var label = data;
              if (row.start === tags[0]) label += ' <span class="badge badge-earliest">earliest</span>';
              return '<a href="https://github.com/labordynamicsinstitute/ssc-mirror/releases/tag/' + data + '" target="_blank">' + label + '</a>';
            }
            return data;
          }
        },
        {
          data: 'end',
          render: function (data, type, row) {
            if (type === 'display') {
              var label = data;
              if (row.end === tags[tags.length - 1]) label += ' <span class="badge badge-latest">latest</span>';
              return '<a href="https://github.com/labordynamicsinstitute/ssc-mirror/releases/tag/' + data + '" target="_blank">' + label + '</a>';
            }
            return data;
          }
        },
        { data: 'days' },
        { data: 'expected' },
        { data: 'actual' }
      ],
      order: [[1, 'asc']],
      paging: false,
      searching: false,
      createdRow: function (row, data) {
        if (data.rowClass) $(row).addClass(data.rowClass);
      }
    });

    // ---- all tags table ----
    // Map each tag to its range index
    var tagRangeMap = {};
    ranges.forEach(function (r, i) {
      r.tags_list.forEach(function (t) {
        tagRangeMap[t] = i + 1;
      });
    });

    var allTagsRows = tags.map(function (tag, idx) {
      return {
        num: idx + 1,
        tag: tag,
        date: tag,
        range: tagRangeMap[tag] || ''
      };
    });

    $('#tags-table').DataTable({
      data: allTagsRows,
      columns: [
        { data: 'num' },
        {
          data: 'tag',
          render: function (data) {
            var badges = '';
            if (data === tags[0])              badges += ' <span class="badge badge-earliest">earliest</span>';
            if (data === tags[tags.length - 1]) badges += ' <span class="badge badge-latest">latest</span>';
            return '<a href="https://github.com/labordynamicsinstitute/ssc-mirror/releases/tag/' + data + '" target="_blank">' + data + '</a>' + badges;
          }
        },
        { data: 'date' },
        { data: 'range' }
      ],
      order: [[2, 'desc']],
      pageLength: 50,
      lengthMenu: [25, 50, 100, 200]
    });
  });
});
</script>
